sections.sectionTitle: Taia leh Sidon tawh kisai Thu

verses.text: Taia khua tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: Tarshish teembaw hawlte aw, Taia khua kisia a, inn leh khawlmunte om nawnlo ahih manin kap un! Saipras gam panin amaute in hih thu hong za uh hi
Tuipi gei-a teng mite aw, thumin tau un. Sidon sumbukte aw, na sawltakte un tuipi kantanin tui lianpite tungah om uh hi
Egypt gama piang ante lei-in na zuak uh a, minam khempeuh tawh sum bawlin na kizom uh hi

Sidon aw, maizum in; bang hang hiam cih leh tuipi in thu gen khin hi. Tua tuipi muan'huai in, “Keimah in naupaii-in na ka sa ngei kei a, nau ka nei ngei kei hi. Ta numei ka khoi ngei kei a, ta pasal zong ka khan'suah ngei kei hi,” ci hi
Egypt gamah hih thu a kizak ciangin, Taia tawh kisai thu hangin amaute in na sa ding uh hi
Tuipi gei-a teng mite aw, Tarshish khua-ah tai-in kap un
Tanglai pekin a piang, gamlapi pek panin a kiphut hih khuapi nomau' lungdampih khuapi mah ahi hiam
Kumpi khuapi ahi, ama sumbukte ulian ahi, ama sumbawlte leitungah a kipahtawite ahi, Taia khuapi hih bang a pian'na ding kua' vaihawm ahi hiam
A Vanglian Topa' vaihawm ahi hi. Miliante' kiphatsaknate a beisakna ding leh a kipahtawi uliante a niamkhiatna dingin a bawl ahi hi
Tarshish mite aw, tu-in kuankhia-in lo kho un. Na sumbawlna teng uh maimang khinta hi
Topa in tuipi tungah a khut zan a, kumpi gamte lumlet gawp hi. Sumbawlna phualpite a kisuksiatna ding Topa in thu piazo hi
Amah in, “Sidon khuapi aw, na lungdamna teng bei khinta hi. Na mite in nenniamna thuak uh a, Saipras tuikulhah a va tai uh hangin, tua lai nangawnah lungnopna hun neilo ding uh hi,” ci hi

Taia khuapi, gamsate' phualpi a suaksakte pen Assiria mite hilo a, Babylon mite ahi hi. Babylon mite in khuapi luhna ding pan'mun bawl uh a, Taia khuapi kulhte susia-in, khuapi sung khempeuh a sia a suaksak uh hi
Tarshish teembaw hawlte aw, na muan' uh khuapi kisia ta ahih manin thumin kap un

Tua a siat huna kipanin kumpi khat nuntak hunsung tan ahi, kum sawmsagih sung Taia khuapi kimangngilh ding hi. Kum sawmsagih a cin' ciangin, paktat numei la sunga mah bangin Taia khuapi tungah piang ding hi. Tua la sungah
“Kuama phawkloh numei paktat aw, harp lasakna khat la in la, khuapi kimkotah pai in! Nangmah hong kiphawk theihna dingin la ngaih phuak in la, la tampi sa in,” ci hi
Kum sawmsagih a cin' ciangin Taia khuapi-ah Topa hawh ding a, Taia khuapi in ama sep ngei sem kikin, leitung kumpi gam khempeuh tawh kizomin sumbawlna sem ding hi
Ama sumbuk vante leh ama sepna panin a ngah nate pen Topa' tungah kipia ding hi. Ahih hangin tuate kikholcip mawkloin, Topa a bia mite' an ding leh puan hoihnono leina-in kizang ding hi.
